_shorthelp: ComboBox list of selectable items displayed in a drop-down. jqWidgets (Commercial)

_selectedIndex.desc: Sets or gets the selected index. Top item is 0. No selection is -1.

_multiSelect.desc: Determines whether the jqxComboBox is in multi-select mode.

_showArrow.desc: Determines whether the jqxComboBox shows its dropdown button.

_showCloseButtons.desc: Determines whether the jqxComboBox shows the items close buttons in multi-select mode.

_searchMode.desc: Sets or gets the item search mode. When the user types into the edit field, the jqxComboBox widget tries to find the searched item using the entered text and the selected search mode.

_autoComplete.desc: Sets or gets the whether the 'autoComplete' feature is enabled or disabled. When this feature is enabled, the jqxComboBox displays in the popup listbox, only the items that match the searched text.

_remoteAutoComplete.desc: Determines whether the items displayed in the popup come from a remote data source. When this property is set to true, the jqxComboBox calls the 'search' callback function when the user types into the input field.

_remoteAutoCompleteDelay.desc: Determines the delay between two keystrokes. The search callback function is called on timeout. The value is specified in milliseconds.

_minLength.desc: Determines the minimum number of characters that need to be entered by the user for search in remote data source when remoteAutoComplete property is set to true.

_source.desc: Sets or gets the items source. Should be a comma separated list of strings.

_displayMember.desc: Sets or gets the displayMember of the Items. The displayMember specifies the name of an object property to display. The name is contained in the collection specified by the 'source' property.

_valueMember.desc: Sets or gets the valueMember of the Items. The valueMember specifies the name of an object property to set as a 'value' of the list items. The name is contained in the collection specified by the 'source' property.

_placeholder.desc: Sets or gets the input field's place holder.

_popupZIndex.desc: Sets or gets the popup's z-index.

_checkboxes.desc: Determines whether checkboxes will be displayed next to the list items.

_scrollBarSize.desc: Sets or gets the scrollbars size.

_enableBrowserBoundsDetection.desc: Sets or gets whether the dropdown detects the browser window's bounds and automatically adjusts the dropdown's position

_autoOpen.desc: Sets or gets whether the DropDown is automatically opened when the mouse cursor is moved over the widget.

_dropDownHorizontalAlignment.desc: Sets or gets the DropDown's alignment.

_dropDownHeight.desc: Sets or gets the height of the jqxComboBox's ListBox displayed in the widget's DropDown.

_dropDownWidth.desc: Sets or gets the width of the jqxComboBox's ListBox displayed in the widget's DropDown.

_autoDropDownHeight.desc: Sets or gets whether the height of the jqxComboBox's ListBox displayed in the widget's DropDown is calculated as a sum of the items heights.

_itemHeight.desc: Sets or gets the height of the jqxComboBox Items. When the itemHeight == - 1, each item's height is equal to its desired height.

_openDelay.desc: Sets or gets the delay of the 'open' animation.

_closeDelay.desc: Sets the delay of the 'close' animation.

_animationType.desc: Sets or gets the type of the animation.

_validateSelection.desc: Function to determine whether an item can be selected in multi-select mode.

_search.desc: Function which is called when the 'remoteAutoComplete' property is set to true and the user types into the ComboBox's input field.

_renderer.desc: Function which is called when an item is rendered. By using the renderer function, you can customize the look of the list items.

_renderSelectedItem.desc: Function which is called when the selected item is rendered. By using the renderSelectedItem function, you can customize the displayed text in the ComboBox's input field.
